task: Phase 03 — Auth: key trust-boundary code paths

snippets.description: Credentials authorize(): early lockout check, Prisma lookup with explicit select (no passwordHash leak), dummy-hash timing defense, generic null for missing/inactive/wrong-password, returns only {id,name,role}.
Edge-safe callbacks: authorized() gates /admin on role===ADMIN; jwt() sources role from DB user; session() carries role+id. No Prisma/bcryptjs import (split-config).
requireAuth(role?) — real server-side boundary: re-reads active+role from DB every call (E4 revocation), throws AuthError (Thai) on unauth/inactive/role-mismatch.
Next 16 route protection (NOT middleware.ts). export default NextAuth(authConfig).auth; matcher excludes /login, /api/auth, /api/health, static/fonts. Recognized by build as 'Proxy (Middleware)'.
Admin actions all requireAuth('ADMIN') (E8); editRole/deactivateUser refuse to demote/deactivate the last active ADMIN (E9).
